name: West Forest Capital - New York, NY | Hard Money Loans, Real Estate Investment Loans & Bridge Loans
description_short: New York-based hard money lender offering bridge loans, rehab financing, and investment property mortgages with rates starting at 10% and funding available within 1-5 days.
description_long:
West Forest Capital is a hard money lending firm based in New York that specializes in providing non-traditional real estate financing for investors and developers. The company positions itself as a specialized lender for fix-and-flip projects, rental property acquisitions, cash-out refinancing, and bridge loans for investment properties. Founded with a focus on speed and local market expertise, the firm claims to leverage deep knowledge of New York and New Jersey real estate markets to deliver quick decisions and creative financing structures.

The company's core offerings include hard money loans with rates starting at 10%, bridge financing for time-sensitive transactions, rehab cost financing up to 100%, refinancing of existing loans, and new investment property purchases. They explicitly market their service to real estate investors, fix-and-flip operators, and developers who need rapid funding decisions. Contact is available via phone (212-537-5833) and text (917-267-9523), and the company advertises same-day to 5-day funding timelines depending on deal complexity.

West Forest Capital differentiates itself through claimed speed (same-day funding in optimal cases, 5 days typically), direct access to decision-makers, market knowledge enabling creative collateral arrangements, and transparency regarding fees and costs. The website emphasizes flexibility in loan terms, low out-of-pocket requirements, and advisory services beyond lending—including market trend consultation, deal metric analysis, and contractor recommendations. Client testimonials highlight the firm's responsiveness, direct communication with principals, and willingness to fund deals other lenders declined.

However, as a hard money lender, West Forest Capital serves a niche market with inherent limitations. Hard money loans carry substantially higher interest rates (10%+ versus 3-7% for conventional mortgages), shorter repayment timelines, higher points/fees, and stricter collateral requirements. The company's focus on investment properties only means owner-occupant homebuyers are explicitly excluded. While speed and flexibility are marketed strengths, they come at a significant cost premium. Client reviews are uniformly positive but reflect the borrower pool (experienced investors accustomed to hard money terms rather than first-time homebuyers).

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extremely fast funding timeline: Claims 1-5 day funding, same-day approval on phone for pre-qualified deals
Direct access to decision-makers: Eliminates multi-layer approval process and back-and-forth delays
Funds up to 100% of documented rehab costs for fix-and-flip projects
Flexible collateral and loan structure: Willing to underwrite deals other lenders decline
Local market expertise in New York and New Jersey counties with hands-on knowledge
Transparent fee structure: Website explicitly states no hidden costs or fees
Advisory services beyond lending: Provides market trend consulting, deal metrics review, and contractor recommendations
cons: Hard money rates starting at 10% are 3-7x higher than conventional mortgage rates (typical 3-5%)
Investment properties only: Explicitly excludes owner-occupant homebuyers, primary residence refinancing, and personal mortgages
Short repayment periods typical of hard money (usually 6-24 months) create refinancing pressure
Points and fees not disclosed on website, likely substantial given hard money market norms
No information on maximum loan amounts, LTV caps, or minimum credit score requirements
best_for: Real estate investors executing fix-and-flip projects with tight closing timelines
Experienced developers needing bridge financing between property sales and purchases
Investors with time-sensitive deals rejected by conventional lenders due to property condition or recent acquisition
Borrowers prioritizing speed and flexibility over interest rate cost
diagnosis: West Forest Capital is best for experienced real estate investors and developers who need rapid funding (days, not weeks) for investment property projects and can afford the 10%+ interest rates and points typical of hard money lending. Primary caveat: This is a niche, expensive financing option for non-owner-occupied properties only; conventional mortgage lenders are far cheaper for qualified borrowers on primary residences and standard investment properties.
services: Hard money loans for investment property purchases
Bridge loans for time-sensitive real estate transactions
Cash-out refinancing on existing investment properties
Refinancing of loans from other hard money lenders
Fix-and-flip project financing with rehab cost coverage
Financing up to 100% of documented rehabilitation costs
Market consultation and deal metric analysis
New York and New Jersey county-specific lending expertise
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
